rationale: Skipped normalized self-alternates where the alternate resolves to the repository's own objects directory.
Prevented stale replacement fallback from adding .git/objects as its own alternate.
Treat duplicate normalized alternates as a changed file state and rewrite unique entries.
Moved Git alternates normalization earlier in agent_runtime_fetch_result after the run record is loaded, before later Git-dependent enrichment.
Summary review only; the actionable items are tracked and addressed by the inline review comments.
